message:
feat(providers): Azure CompatConfig support + Gemini/OpenAI if-else normalization

src/providers/azure.rs:
- Add compat: Option<CompatConfig> field to AzureOpenAIProvider with
  a with_compat() builder method for provider-specific overrides
- Make build_messages() take &self instead of being a static method so
  it can read compat.system_role_name to override the default "system"
  role (some Azure deployments require "developer" instead)
- Apply compat.custom_headers in the streaming request builder, enabling
  per-model custom headers (e.g., x-model-version for preview APIs)

src/providers/mod.rs:
- Wire with_compat(entry.compat.clone()) into the Azure provider
  construction in create_provider()

src/providers/gemini.rs + openai.rs:
- Reorder if-else branches in text content_index calculation to put
  the common case (last_is_text → reuse index) first and the rare
  case (new text block → push + emit TextStart) second. Pure style
  change for readability; no behavior change.
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on OpenAI process_choice()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
